evaluations.name: Government Hours Profile
evaluations.recommendation: Baseline normal — deviations indicate unauthorized after-hours use.

evaluations.name: High Night-Time Base Load
evaluations.message: Building is consuming 0.864% of daytime energy overnight.
evaluations.recommendation: Investigate equipment left running overnight. Schedule HVAC setback.

evaluations.name: Weekend Consumption Anomaly
evaluations.message: Weekend usage is 0.97% of weekday — expected <20%.
evaluations.recommendation: Review weekend HVAC schedules and unoccupied equipment.

evaluations.name: Demand Spike Detection
evaluations.message: Peak demand is 1.9x the average — opportunity to flatten load curve.
evaluations.recommendation: Implement demand response: stagger HVAC start, shift non-critical loads.

evaluations.name: Weather Sensitivity Check
evaluations.message: Energy use is 20% correlated with outdoor temperature.
evaluations.recommendation: Optimize HVAC based on temperature forecast to reduce reactive energy spikes.

evaluations.name: Seasonal Energy Pattern
evaluations.recommendation: Seasonal HVAC tuning can yield 10-20% energy savings.

evaluations.name: High Consumption During Low-Occupancy Hours
evaluations.recommendation: Configure occupancy sensors and timer-based shutdowns.

evaluations.name: Weekend Energy Waste
evaluations.message: Weekend energy at 97% of weekday — government building should be minimal!
evaluations.recommendation: Enable weekend lockdown mode with master shutoff.
